name: skolailab-astro
description: Cloudflare/CI build proxy — Astro aplikacija je v skol-ai/. Zgradi podmapo in skopira dist v koren, da deluje s privzetimi Cloudflare nastavitvami (build: npm run build, output: dist).

scripts.build: npm --prefix skol-ai ci && npm --prefix skol-ai run build && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('skol-ai/dist','dist',{recursive:true,force:true})"
